summary: The conversation is about a person inquiring about admission to a B.Ed course. The speaker provides information about the admission process, fees, and deadlines. The speaker also instructs the person to come to the office before 4 o'clock to complete the admission process. The fees for the course are discussed, including the total fee and the installment plan.

key_discussion_points.details: The person is inquiring about admission to a B.Ed course and the speaker is providing information about the process.
The total fee for the course is fifty-two thousand rupees per year, with an initial payment of twenty thousand rupees and four installments of eleven thousand rupees each.
The person needs to come to the office before 4 o'clock to complete the admission process, as the office will be closed after 5 o'clock.

action_items.task: Come to the office before 4 o'clock to complete the admission process
Pay the initial fee of twenty thousand rupees
